experience.title: School Website Development — Web Developer & Quality TesterAcademic Project
experience.description: Developed and executed manual testing protocols for a fully responsive institutional website. Verified navigation menus, multi-device responsiveness, contact forms, and comprehensive user flows. Identified, documented, and resolved front-end rendering bugs and interactive alignment anomalies. Conducted comprehensive cross-browser compatibility testing; managed code delivery and version control via Git/GitHub. Proficient at parsing deep in-game ecosystems to catch technical bugs including collision/clipping failures, script blocks, texture pop-ins, audio latency, animation freezes, camera collision anomalies, and localization issues. Rockstar Games Titles: Red Dead Redemption I & II, Grand Theft Auto (III, Vice City, San Andreas, IV, V, Online), Bully, L.A.
